name: Izuku Midoriya
image_source: File:Izuku Midoriya First Hero Costume Full Body Anime.png

ability.summary: One For All successor with explosive mobility, layered inherited quirks, and relentless problem-solving.

name: Katsuki Bakugo
image_source: File:Katsuki Bakugo Hero Costume Full Body.png

ability.summary: Explosion-powered prodigy who mixes speed, blasts, and aggression into elite offensive pressure.
Zero Gravity user who can disrupt positioning, rescue allies, and create clever battlefield swings.
Engine-legged speedster who excels at straight-line bursts, rescue movement, and disciplined teamwork.
Half-Cold Half-Hot fighter with enormous area control, range, and defensive coverage.
Frog-like mobility specialist with tongue reach, stealth, wall movement, and steady support instincts.
Hardening bruiser who anchors the frontline with durability, grit, and protective pressure.
Electricity user who can stun groups and empower teams but risks shorting out after heavy output.

name: Kyoka Jiro
image_source: File:Kyoka Jiro Full Body Hero Costume.png

ability.summary: Sound-based scout and ranged attacker whose earphone jacks support detection, disruption, and team intel.
Creation user whose value scales with planning, knowledge, and access to time for support items.
Dark Shadow user who offers strong offense and defense, especially when darkness boosts his partner entity.
Acid user with slippery movement, melting attacks, and flexible mid-range disruption.
Tape user who swings, restrains, and creates positioning plays with clean team utility.
Martial artist with a strong tail who relies on fundamentals, close combat, and clean technique.
Multi-arm scout and protector with strong senses, reach, and defensive rescue utility.
Animal-command user who provides scouting and swarm support when animals are available.

name: Rikido Sato
image_source: File:Prototype Rikido Sato Hero Costume Design.png

ability.summary: Sugar-powered bruiser who trades sugar intake for temporary strength boosts.
Naval laser user with precise beam attacks but a body that struggles with sustained output.

name: Toru Hagakure
image_source: File:Toru Hagakure Full Body Hero Costume.png

ability.summary: Invisible hero student who supports stealth, misdirection, and light-refraction tricks.

name: Minoru Mineta
image_source: File:Minoru Mineta Full Body Hero Costume Anime.png

ability.summary: Sticky-ball trap user whose quirk is annoying but useful for restraining and slowing enemies.
Former Symbol of Peace with overwhelming strength, speed, durability, and heroic presence.
Top firepower hero whose Hellflame gives massive ranged offense, flight-like movement, and pressure.
Winged speed hero who excels at rescue, tracking, precision feather control, and rapid engagements.
Fiber-control expert who can restrain enemies and stabilize battlefields with precise technique.
Rabbit-powered melee hero with ferocious speed, kicks, and pain tolerance.
Erasure hero who can shut down quirks on sight and turn fights into skill contests.
Voice hero whose sonic blasts provide wide-area disruption and loud crowd-control pressure.
Sleep-inducing hero who uses aroma-based crowd control and close-range tools.
Veteran jet-speed mentor who fights with high mobility and sharp combat experience.
Foresight user whose prediction and martial skill make him a dangerous tactical fighter.
Absorption hero who tanks damage, protects allies, and converts stored impact into power.
Size-changing hero who brings giant-scale strength and public battlefield presence.
Wooden limb hero who restrains villains and supports rescue with long-range branches.
Dragon hero with flight, strength, durability, and strong team-leader presence.
Orca-themed hero with sonic attacks, strength, and strong aquatic-style pressure.
Ninja-like hero who flattens his body into threads for infiltration, speed, and precision attacks.

name: Mirio Togata
image_source: File:Mirio Togata Hero Costume Anime Action.png

ability.summary: Permeation user whose timing, prediction, and melee skill make him extremely hard to hit.

name: Nejire Hado
image_source: File:Nejire Hado Hero Costume Anime Action.png

ability.summary: Wave Motion user with flight-like mobility, stamina, and spiraling energy blasts.
Manifest user who converts eaten food into versatile animal traits for offense and defense.
Brainwashing user who can swing fights instantly if opponents answer him.
Support-course inventor whose gadgets and analysis can empower allies more than direct fighting.
Healing specialist whose quirk accelerates recovery at the cost of the patient's stamina.
Hyper-intelligent principal whose real strength is planning, leadership, and trap design.
Rewind quirk user with enormous potential but limited control and noncombat role.
Izuku's mom with a small attraction quirk and overwhelming emotional support value.
Copy user who can borrow others' quirks for tricky counterplay and team tactics.
Class 1-B leader whose enlarged hands give strong close combat and rescue utility.
Steel-hardening brawler who mirrors Kirishima-style frontline durability.
Vine-haired student who restrains enemies and controls space from mid-range.
Softening user who turns terrain into traps and controls movement.
Lizard Tail Splitter user who separates body parts for scouting, evasion, and harassment.
Horn Cannon user who flies and controls horns for rescue or ranged pressure.
Cement-control hero who reshapes urban terrain for defense, walls, and battlefield control.
Gun hero with homing accuracy and strong ranged pressure.
Rescue hero whose Black Hole quirk is extremely dangerous but carefully restrained.
Blood-control teacher who hardens and manipulates his own blood in combat.
Dog-themed UA staff hero with tracking senses and aggressive close-range presence.
Support-course teacher whose excavating gear and engineering make him valuable around equipment.
UA cook whose practical value is morale and nutrition rather than combat.
Telepathic Wild Pussycat who coordinates teams and rescue operations.
Earth Flow hero who shapes terrain and creates earth beasts for pressure.
Wild Pussycat brawler with strong close-range rescue hero presence.
Search user whose scouting value is excellent even when combat power is limited.
One For All predecessor remembered for flight, heroism, and high-level legacy power.
America's top hero whose New Order can impose reality-bending rules under strict conditions.
Shield hero who protects allies with durable barriers and heroic sacrifice instincts.
Rescue-focused laundry hero with bubble-like utility and public safety value.
Villain scientist whose Nomu research and body modifications enable massive strategic threats.
Advanced Nomu type with intelligence, regeneration, and stacked combat quirks.
High-End Nomu with flight, regeneration, strength, and terrifying pressure against pro heroes.
Magnetism villain who disrupts positioning and supports League team chaos.
Blade-tooth villain who attacks with extending teeth and vicious close-range pressure.
Gas villain whose poison cloud can disable groups if opponents lack protection.
Brawler villain whose rapid punches and love of combat make him dangerous up close.
Hassaikai aide whose clock-hand hair can slow targets after contact.
Hassaikai lieutenant who can merge with and control objects or structures.
Truth-demanding Hassaikai member who can break composure and expose secrets.
Meta Liberation strategist who controls puppet-like human-shaped devices and networks.
Meta Liberation leader whose quirk boosts followers through commanding rhetoric.
Explosive journalist-villain whose quirk turns touched objects into bombs.
Ice manipulator with large-scale battlefield control and strong ranged pressure.
Public hero secretly tied to villains, using slide mobility and deception.

name: All For One
image_source: File:All For One has full control of Tomura's body.png

ability.summary: Ancient villain who steals, stockpiles, and combines quirks into overwhelming layered power.
Decay villain whose touch can erase targets and terrain while his evolution makes him terrifying.
Blue-flame villain with extreme firepower and reckless self-damaging output.
Blood-drinking shapeshifter whose disguise and copied identities create chaos and ambush pressure.
Clone-maker who can multiply people or himself into overwhelming numbers when stable.
Lizard-like villain whose combat value is lower but loyalty and movement keep him relevant.
Compression villain who can instantly capture or move targets and objects with a touch.
Warp Gate villain whose portals provide elite positioning, escape, and team mobility.
Hero Killer whose Bloodcurdle paralysis and blade skill punish careless close-range opponents.
Matter-reconstruction villain who can disassemble or rebuild targets with a touch.
Elasticity villain whose quirk turns surfaces springy for tricky movement and defense.
Support villain whose Love quirk dramatically boosts Gentle when her feelings peak.
Muscle-augmentation brute with huge strength, durability, and direct-fight pressure.
Engineered monster built to counter All Might with shock absorption, regeneration, and huge raw power.
Stress-powered villain whose stored stress becomes destructive strength and pressure.
Former pro sniper whose rifle quirk and precision make her deadly at extreme range.
Massive loyal powerhouse with destructive scale, endurance, and disaster-level battlefield impact.
